context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 22 complete. New design-tokens module added at lib/ai/design-tokens.js with exports: FALLBACK_TOKENS, parseTokens, buildThemeFile, formatTokensForPrompt, analyzeDesignTokens. Integration in message-stream.js at Step 1.5 (~lines 3720-3830). HARD RULE #18 (THEME-TOKEN DISCIPLINE) added to brief-builder.js at line 101. Rule 11 (hardcoded-color-classes-bypass-theme) added to brief-reviewer.js at line 74. All recipes in recipes.js converted to use CSS variables via arbitrary-value Tailwind syntax. Jest suite now at 248/248 tests across 17 files. All tests are pure unit/prompt tests - no DB, no LLM, no HTTP required.
